triggers.label: HTTP request
triggers.when: invoked on-demand via a URL / webhook

triggers.label: Schedule
triggers.when: runs on a cron schedule (daily, hourly, weekdays)

triggers.label: Connector event
triggers.when: reacts to an external SaaS event (Outlook mail, GitHub issue, Teams)

triggers.label: Storage queue
triggers.when: processes messages from a storage queue

triggers.label: Blob created
triggers.when: reacts to a file/blob being uploaded

agent.describes: a markdown-authored AI agent (*.agent.md) — one reasoning step

tool.describes: a Python @tool function the agents can call

skill.describes: packaged domain knowledge (SKILL.md) agents ground their output in; shared across agents

mcp.describes: an MCP server exposing external tools (mcp.json)

outputs.label: Connector action
outputs.when: open a ticket, post to Teams/Slack, update a SaaS record

outputs.label: Send email
outputs.when: reply to or notify someone by email

outputs.label: Enqueue message
outputs.when: hand off to another queue-triggered process

outputs.label: Return response
outputs.when: return the result to the HTTP caller
